hero_s.intro:
I'm Temirlan Tlektessov,
a Front-End Engineer who builds products end-to-end - React and TypeScript on the front, Supabase and serverless behind them.
hero_s.intro_mobile:
I'm Temirlan Tlektessov,
a Front-End Engineer (React, TypeScript) who builds products end-to-end.
hero_s.projects: Open to work - available for new roles

about_s.title: About me
about_s.intro1: I'm a front-end engineer specializing in React and TypeScript, with a degree in Computer Science & Engineering from Korea University. Most recently I was on the Core team at Forte Bank, where I built a 17-component design system adopted across the frontend team - standardizing UI patterns and speeding up feature work.
about_s.intro2: Earlier, at NODAMEN in Seoul, I shipped web and Flutter products: membership and personalized-content pages, plus a Flutter admin dashboard for managing a 4K digital-art platform across PC, mobile, and TV.
about_s.intro3: Lately I've been building and shipping my own products end-to-end - from a React + Supabase dashboard to an AI-powered iOS app driven by Claude. I care about clean, accessible interfaces and owning the whole slice, from the UI down to the API behind it. A few of these live in the "Projects" section below.

info.title: Finally, some quick bits about me.

skills_s.title: Skills
skills_s.intro: The skills, tools and technologies I am good at:

experience_s.title: Experience
experience_s.intro: Here is a quick summary of my most recent experiences:

forte_summary: Built a 17-component React + TypeScript design system adopted by 8 engineers, standardizing UI patterns and accelerating feature development across the frontend team.

Developed a custom Commitizen adapter to standardize commit conventions while automating code quality enforcement via ESLint, Prettier, Husky, and lint-staged to eliminate style drift and catch issues pre-commit. (https://www.npmjs.com/package/cz-conventional-changelog-skippable)
Architected a frontend testing strategy using Vitest and MSW, decoupling frontend development from backend dependencies and reducing regression bugs across feature releases.
nodamen_summary: Developed membership, personalized content, and personal pages using HTML, CSS, JS, and jQuery, improving overall website functionality and user engagement by over 30%.
Successfully integrated RESTful APIs into the front-end, enabling dynamic content delivery and realtime updates for membership subscriptions and personalized content.
Collaborated with the QC/QA team to identify and fix front-end bugs, ensuring a seamless user experience and reducing error rates by 54%.
Developed a responsive and dynamic admin page using Flutter, implementing efficient user interfaces and robust back-end integration to manage administrative tasks seamlessly
embassy_summary: Provided diagnostics and maintenance for personnel electronic devices, and assisted in the digitization of embassy services, enhancing operational efficiency and user accessibility
Developed a Telegram bot that enabled users to communicate and receive support from the embassy, facilitating over 200 user interactions each month and improving response times by 35%.
sejong_summary: Provided teaching assistance for the Advanced C Programming course, supporting the instructor and enhancing student understanding and performance.
Updated weekly labs for 30 students (8 Labs in total)
Planned and supervised midterm, final, and qualification exams, ensuring smooth execution and adherence to academic standards, resulting in a 15% improvement in student performance.

projects_s.title: Work
projects_s.intro: Some of the projects I worked on:
projects_s.tessera_description: An AI-powered life-design app for iOS that builds a personalized daily plan around your personality, goals, and behavior. A quiz maps you to one of six personality types, then Claude generates and adapts each day's plan - learning from what you actually do via autonomous tool-use. Backed by a thin, auth-gated Vercel proxy so the API key never ships inside the app.
projects_s.goszakup_description: A dashboard that screens Kazakhstan's government procurement portal for open IT lots, scores them by relevance, and tracks what's new - turning hours of manual screening into minutes. A Node + Cheerio scraper runs on a GitHub Actions cron and writes to Supabase behind row-level security.
projects_s.cz_description: An open-source Commitizen adapter I authored at Forte Bank to standardize commit conventions team-wide, with a skippable prompt flow. Wired into ESLint, Prettier, and Husky to enforce code quality before every commit. Published on npm.
projects_s.patron_description: A platform for digital exhibitions curated by Nodamen's staff, allowing users to enjoy 4K digital artworks on PC, mobile and TV.
projects_s.mindsight_description: Mental health app that integrates with offline meditation projects. Users can periodically input and then assess their emotions and psychological states, providing insights through graphs. Based on this analysis, the AI recommends personalized meditation content from a library of over 5,000 resources tailored to 21 different emotional states.
projects_s.mindsight_admin_description: Admin panel for the Mindsight app, allowing the staff to manage users, content, and more.
